title: Śānti-karma
century: Medieval (c. 7th–14th c.); Purāṇic redactions c. 9th–11th c.
description: The first of the six ṣaṭ-karma — the pacification (*śānti*) rite for calming hostile forces, neutralising disturbance, and restoring equilibrium. Moderate caution (the only saumya member of the six-act framework). Preserved here as heritage / source material. Not instructional.
